nbResults.description: Total number of places matching the request.

places.description: List of place matching the request.

location.description: Primary location constraint (required by route validation).

locations.description: Optional list of locations for widget-like multi-location search.

categories.description: Multiple categories (restricted by user status at route level).

placeType.description: Resource type to search: fixed places or itineraries.

word.description: Free-text search applied to place and service content.

openToday.description: Only return results that are open today.

languages.description: Filter places by languages spoken at the place.

widgetId.description: Widget identifier used to apply widget-specific search rules.

schema.description: Exhaustive request body schema for POST /new-search/:lang? (non-admin route).

info.title: Soliguide Public API
info.description: This API exposes public Soliguide data for search and integrations.

Common_SoliguideCountries.description: Country code restricted to Soliguide countries. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

geoValue.description: Geographic identifier for non-position searches (country, region, department, city, etc.).

coordinates.description: Geographic coordinates used when `geoType` is `position`, as `[longitude, latitude]`. Format GeoJSON.

distance.description: Search radius in kilometers for position-based search.

label.description: Free-text label associated with the searched geographic area.

department.description: Department name of the searched area.

regionCode.description: Administrative code of the searched region.

departmentCode.description: Department code of the searched area. Examples: `974`, `2A`, `91`, `06`.

region.description: Region name of the searched area.

country.description: Country code. Restricted to Soliguide countries for non-API users.

region.description: Region name of the searched area.

geoValue.description: Geographic identifier for a borough search. This value usually includes the postal code.

geoValue.description: Geographic identifier for a city search. This value can include the postal code suffix used by Soliguide.

SearchRequest_Location.description: Geographic mode used by the search location.

appointment.description: Filter on places requiring an appointment.

inconditionnel.description: Filter on places with unconditional access. When `true`, it targets places where unconditional access is the applicable access mode.

inscription.description: Filter on places requiring prior registration.

pmr.description: Filter on places accessible to people with reduced mobility.

price.description: Filter on fee-based places or services.

sign.description: Filter on places offering sign-language accessibility.

accueil.description: Type of welcome expected for the public: unconditional, preferential or exclusive.

age.description: Age filter for the welcomed public.

min.description: Minimum age used by the audience filter. Values from `0` to `99` are accepted.

max.description: Maximum age used by the audience filter. Values from `0` to `99` are accepted.

gender.description: Gender-related audience filters. If all possible values are selected, it is treated as no restriction.

administrative.description: Administrative-status audience filters. If all possible values are selected, it is treated as no restriction.

familialle.description: Family-situation audience filters. If all possible values are selected, it is treated as no restriction.

other.description: Other audience filters. If all possible values are selected, it is treated as no restriction.

Common_PlaceLanguages.description: Language code spoken at the place.

intervalType.description: Comparison mode used for the update-date filter.

value.description: Date used by the update filter. Format ISO 8601.

sortBy.description: Field used to sort the search results.

page.description: Page number of the paginated results.

limit.description: Maximum number of results returned per page.

fields.description: Space-separated list of fields to include in the response payload.

seo_url.description: SEO-friendly URL slug of the place.

auto.description: Indicates whether the place comes from an automated data source.

name.example: Restos du Coeur - Camion de Paris 5e

description.description: Localized HTML content describing the place.
description.example: Les équipes des Restos du Coeur se rendent sur des points fixes pour partager des moments de rencontre et de convivialité autour d'un repas à consommer sur place.

status.description: Publication status of the place: `DRAFT`, `ONLINE`, `OFFLINE` or `CLOSED`.

visibility.description: Indicates who can access information about this place.

isOpenToday.description: Whether the place is open today. Recalculated daily.

services_all.description: List of services available at the place.

position.description: Address and geographic information of the place.

parcours.description: Details about the Parcours of a facility when `placeType` is "PARCOURS_MOBILE"

sourceLanguage.description: Language used by the original source data.

createdAt.description: Creation date of the place. Format ISO 8601.

updatedAt.description: Last update date of the place. Format ISO 8601.

updatedByUserAt.description: Last user update date of the place. Format ISO 8601.

tempInfos.description: Temporary closure, opening hours and message information.

sources.description: External data sources paired with the place.

distance.description: Distance between the search center and the place, in meters.

Common_PlaceStatus.description: Indicate if this place is currently published.

Common_PlaceVisibility.description: Indicates who has access to information about this place.

categorie.description: Deprecated numeric category identifier of the service.

close.description: Temporary closure settings for the service.

description.description: Localized HTML content describing the service.
description.example: Distribution de repas chauds tous les soirs.

differentHours.description: Indicates whether the service has opening hours different from the place.

differentModalities.description: Indicates whether the service has access conditions different from the place.

differentPublics.description: Indicates whether the service welcomes a public different from the place.

hours.description: Opening hours specific to the service.

isOpenToday.description: Whether the service is open today. Recalculated daily.

modalities.description: Access conditions specific to the service.

publics.description: Audience information specific to the service.

saturated.description: Current saturation status of the service.

createdAt.description: Creation date of the service. Format ISO 8601.

categorySpecificFields.description: Details specific to the service category.

jobsList.description: Deprecated field used for insertion-by-economic-activity professions.

name.description: Deprecated additional label for some service categories.

closedHolidays.description: Opening behavior on public holidays: `UNKNOWN` when not specified, `OPEN` when open, `CLOSED` when closed.

open.description: Indicates whether the place or service is open on that day.

timeslot.description: Opening slots for the day. Up to 3 slots can be defined.

start.description: Start time of the opening slot, encoded as `HHmm` without separator, using 3 or 4 digits.

end.description: End time of the opening slot, encoded as `HHmm` without separator, using 3 or 4 digits.

inconditionnel.description: Indicates unconditional access. When `true`, it is the only access condition to consider.

orientation.description: Access requiring orientation. When this condition applies, address and coordinates must not be displayed publicly unless explicitly allowed by agreement.

pmr.description: Accessibility for people with reduced mobility.

checked.description: Indicates whether the place is accessible to people with reduced mobility.
Indicates whether the access condition applies.

precisions.description: Additional details about the access condition.

accueil.description: Type of welcome for the public: `0` unconditional, `1` unconditional adapted to a specific public, `2` exclusive.

administrative.description: Administrative statuses accepted by the place. If every possible value is selected, it means there is no restriction.

age.description: Age restrictions for the accepted public. Values from `0` to `99` mean no age restriction.

description.description: Free-text details about specific public restrictions or adaptations.
description.example: Public en situation de grande précarité.

familialle.description: Family situations accepted by the place. If every possible value is selected, it means there is no restriction.

gender.description: Gender-related restrictions or adaptations. If every possible value is selected, it means there is no restriction.

other.description: Other audience restrictions or adaptations. If every possible value is selected, it means there is no restriction.

ukrainePrecisions.description: Additional details about what the place offers for displaced Ukrainians.

SearchResponse_CategorySpecificFields.description: Category-specific service details. Available fields depend on the service category.

coordinates.description: Geographic coordinates of the place as `[longitude, latitude]`. Format GeoJSON..

additionalInformation.description: Additional address information such as building, floor or access details.

complementAdresse.description: Additional address information such as building, floor or access details.

departmentCode.description: Department code of the place. Examples: `974`, `2A`, `91`, `06`.

slugs.description: URL compatible labels for position's text properties

timeZone.description: Time zone of the place. Format IANA time zone identifier.

facebook.description: Facebook page URL of the organization.

instagram.description: Instagram page URL of the organization.

countryCode.description: Country code used to interpret the phone number. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

isSpecialPhoneNumber.description: Indicates whether the phone number is a special short number.

Common_SupportedLanguagesCode.description: Language in which a Soliguide record can be authored or served. Format ISO 639-1 (two-letter code).

hours.description: Temporary opening hours of the place.

actif.description: Indicates whether the temporary information is currently active.

dateDebut.description: Start date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

dateFin.description: End date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

description.example: Fermeture exceptionnelle pendant les congés d'été.

actif.description: Indicates whether the temporary information is currently active.

dateDebut.description: Start date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

dateFin.description: End date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

description.example: Fermeture exceptionnelle pendant les congés d'été.

actif.description: Indicates whether the temporary information is currently active.

dateDebut.description: Start date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

dateFin.description: End date of the temporary information. Format ISO 8601.

description.example: Fermeture exceptionnelle pendant les congés d'été.

ids.description: Various sources of information providing data about this place.

id.description: Formatted external identifier of the source. Format UUID.

isOrigin.description: Indicates if the place has been created by the source.

license.description: URL of the license associated to the data.
